use_cases: Displaying payment summaries with amount totals in financial dashboards
Showing financial metrics with interactive sub-sections for additional details
Presenting payment-related data with team member avatars and counts
Building fintech and payment management interfaces with clean card layouts
Creating interactive payment overview sections in SaaS billing pages
ai_summary: A PaymentSummaryCard component for displaying financial payment data with a prominent amount display, interactive sub-card section with avatars, and keyboard navigation support. Built with shadcn/ui design system variables for consistent theming. The card features a clean, minimalist aesthetic suitable for fintech and SaaS dashboards, with responsive design that works across desktop and mobile platforms.
